description:
Shio tells Eiyu she can`t make the fireworks. Haru makes her first appearance.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Kept Running and Missed the Fireworks? Since It Matters Too Much, It Still Won`t Start a Rom-Com
Nigeteru Mama ja Hanabi ga Owarushi Taisetsu Dakara Lovecome ni Naranai
逃げてるままじゃ花火が終わるし大切だからラブコメにならない
